'''Ona Shai''' was the [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] of the ''[[Baanu Miir]]''. She was a Yuuzhan Vong.

==Biography==
Ona, a member of [[Domain Shai]], was born with a slight stoop in her spine. Though [[Yuuzhan Vong]] born physically deformed were usually [[Death/Legends|killed]] at birth, Shai was allowed to live, as it did not impede her abilities. Because of the problems facing ''Baanu Miir'', she was quite furious that they were not receiving any help. Ona Shai was also younger than [[Nen Yim]].<ref name="Rebirth" />

{{Char-stub}}
